g.text: 1. T=0: Message delivered to Consumer A
→ Message becomes INVISIBLE (not delivered to others)
2. T=30s: No ACK received from Consumer A
4. T=32s: Message delivered to Consumer B
KEY INSIGHT: Message doesn't disappear on delivery.
It becomes invisible, then reappears if unacknowledged.

text.tspan: 1. T=0: Message delivered to Consumer A
→ Message becomes INVISIBLE (not delivered to others)
2. T=30s: No ACK received from Consumer A
4. T=32s: Message delivered to Consumer B
KEY INSIGHT: Message doesn't disappear on delivery.
It becomes invisible, then reappears if unacknowledged.
